render_data.title: Average time to produce 50 cm³ of gas
render_data.metric: Average time to produce 50 cm³ gas / s
render_data.reaction: metal + nitric acid → metal nitrate + hydrogen
render_data.task: Read each coin's average reaction time off the bar chart, cross-reference the bar to its coin composition, then use the year-composition table to determine the year of manufacture.

image_prompt: SVG: line/scatter graph 'Global Land-Ocean Temperature Index'. X-axis years 1960-2020 ticks every 10. Y-axis 'Temperature Anomaly / °C' -0.5 to 1.0 ticks every 0.5. Rising trend from ~0.0 in 1960 (dipping slightly negative ~1965) up to ~0.75 by 2014; ~0.22 at 1980 and ~0.62 at 2010.

SVG: bar chart 'Emission comparison graph'. X-axis 'Type of car': Petrol, Electric, Hybrid, Plug-in hybrid. Y-axis 'Emissions from fuel used / CO₂' 0-5 ticks every 1. Petrol ~4.75, Electric 0, Hybrid ~3.5, Plug-in hybrid ~1.9.

SVG illustration: history of make-up — a classical painted portrait (cosmetics/social status), radial arrangement of henna-decorated hands, coloured ores of copper (teal/blue/native copper) and iron, and a row of mineral cosmetic powder pots.

SVG: MYP short-form periodic table with groups 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 0 and periods 1-7; lead (Pb) highlighted green in Group 4 Period 6, arsenic (As) highlighted red in Group 5 Period 4; legend identifying Pb (metal) and As (metalloid).

SVG illustration: ball-and-stick ester molecules scattered above a skin-toned surface ('the molecules in the perfume start to evaporate and leave the surface of the skin'); a second 'After 1 hour' panel with fewer, larger molecules near the skin surface.

SVG: ball-and-stick structures of five methanoate esters (methyl, ethyl, propyl, butyl, pentyl methanoate) showing the H-C(=O)-O- formyl ester group and increasing alkyl chain length, with a Key for H, C and O atoms.

SVG: four GHS-style hazard pictograms A (corrosive), B (oxidising), C (toxic — skull & crossbones), D (flammable); and a row of laboratory equipment — ruler, thermometer, pH probe, gas syringe, temperature probe — each labelled.
SVG: row of seven US penny coins and a 'Composition / %' data table by year range (1793-1849 to 1982-present) with Copper, Nickel, Zinc and Tin percentage columns reproduced exactly.
SVG illustration: a large irregular crystalline gold nugget (the Perth Mint nugget, mass 23 218.3 g) on a dark museum display stand with a soft backlight halo.

render_data.title: Carbon cycle — label the coloured arrows
render_data.prompt: Drag each chemical reaction onto the correctly coloured arrow in the key: grey (1), red (2) and green (3).

image_prompt: SVG: side-view schematic of a hybrid car and a plug-in hybrid car, each labelled Battery, Motor, Fuel tank and Engine, with a blue electric power arrow (battery↔motor) and green petrol arrows (fuel tank→engine, petrol station→fuel tank); the plug-in adds an Electricity mains charging connection to the battery.
